metadata.name: cctp_hook
metadata.description: Reflex CCTP V2 Hook - post-mint Solana hook that auto-approves an AEP Settlement milestone after a Base->Solana CCTP V2 round-trip. Surface 3 of the AEP Reflex demo.

instructions.name: auto_approve_milestone
docs: Post-CCTP-mint hook. Called by Circle's CCTP V2 receiver (or, until that
integration is concrete, by the relayer fallback) after USDC has been
minted on Solana for the agent's session round-trip.
On success:
- The replay-guard PDA is initialized (idempotent on the IC-4 triple).
- `settlement::approve_milestone` is invoked via CPI, signed by the
`hook_signer` PDA which the upstream escrow must list as its
`client`.
- A `MilestoneAutoApproved` event is emitted for the dashboard.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The transaction signer — typically the CCTP V2 receiver dispatcher or
(until that is wired) the relayer. The Hook does not authorize off
this signer's identity; the on-chain trust anchor is the
CCTP-attestation guarantee that already gated the mint, plus the
`hook_signer` PDA's exclusive ability to act as the escrow's `client`.

accounts.name: agent_authority
docs: The agent's external authority pubkey. The Hook's signer PDA is
derived from this key, and the upstream `create_escrow` MUST have
listed `hook_signer(agent_authority)` as the escrow's `client`.
`escrow.client == hook_signer.key()` inside the handler. This account
is read-only and not deserialized.

accounts.name: hook_signer
docs: PDA the Hook signs CPI calls with. Seeds: `["hook_signer", agent]`.
Read-only here; passed as `client` (a Signer in Settlement's view) via
CPI signer seeds.

accounts.name: replay_guard
docs: Replay-guard PDA. `init` constraint = duplicate triples atomically
abort before any CPI runs. Closed lazily after a configurable TTL by
a separate, currently unscaffolded instruction (Q-S3-D).

accounts.name: escrow
docs: AEP Settlement escrow being approved. We read `client` from the raw
data (offset 8..40) and pass-through to Settlement's CPI which fully
validates the account internally.

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow's USDC token account. Mutable.

accounts.name: provider_token_account
docs: Provider's USDC token account (the session-pool PDA's ATA).

accounts.name: settlement_program
docs: AEP Settlement program — target of the CPI. Address-pinned.

accounts.name: registry_program
docs: AEP Agent Registry program — required by Settlement's
`ApproveMilestone` for the reputation CPI sub-call.

accounts.name: provider_authority
docs: Provider authority (= escrow.provider). Plumbed for Settlement's
SEC-1 external-anchor constraint.

accounts.name: provider_owner_nonce
docs: Provider owner-nonce PDA (Registry-owned).

accounts.name: provider_profile
docs: Provider profile PDA (Registry-owned).

accounts.name: settlement_authority
docs: Settlement's signing-authority PDA — Settlement re-derives this from
its own ID, so we just pass the AccountInfo through.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Settlement's ProtocolConfig PDA. Read-only.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program — required by `init` on `replay_guard`.

errors.name: PayloadEscrowMismatch
errors.msg: Payload escrow_pda does not match the escrow account passed in.

errors.name: InvalidBaseTxHash
errors.msg: Payload base_tx_hash must be non-zero (probable malformed CCTP message).

errors.name: EscrowClientMismatch
errors.msg:
Escrow client field does not equal the hook_signer PDA derived from \
         agent_authority — upstream create_escrow must have used hook_signer \
         as the escrow's client.

errors.name: InvalidRegistryProgram
errors.msg: registry_program account does not match the canonical Agent Registry program ID.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementProgram
errors.msg: settlement_program account does not match the canonical Settlement program ID.

errors.name: EscrowOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Escrow account is not owned by the Settlement program.

errors.name: EscrowAccountTooSmall
errors.msg: Escrow account data is too small to read TaskEscrow.client at offset 8.

types.name: MilestoneAutoApproved
docs: Emitted from `auto_approve_milestone` after the CPI into Settlement
returns successfully.
Spec verbatim (master §"Hook program"):
`MilestoneAutoApproved { escrow, milestone_index, base_tx_hash }`
Two extra fields (`amount_returned_micros`, `agent_authority`) are
included for observability — they are derived from the on-chain payload
and the signer-PDA derivation, not new authoritative state.

fields.name: escrow
docs: AEP Settlement escrow PDA.

fields.name: milestone_index
docs: Milestone index that was auto-approved.

fields.name: base_tx_hash
docs: Base-side settle / burn transaction hash (cross-chain link).

fields.name: amount_returned_micros
docs: Amount of USDC (micros) returned to Solana via the CCTP round-trip.

fields.name: agent_authority
docs: Agent authority pubkey the `hook_signer` PDA was derived from.

types.name: ReflexHookPayload
docs: IC-4 payload — verbatim layout from the master spec.
```rust
pub struct ReflexHookPayload {
pub escrow_pda: Pubkey,           // AEP Settlement escrow
pub milestone_index: u8,          // which milestone to approve
pub base_tx_hash: [u8; 32],       // Base-side x402 settle tx
pub amount_returned_micros: u64,  // USDC returned to Solana
Borsh-serialized size: 32 + 1 + 32 + 8 = **73 bytes**.

fields.name: escrow_pda
docs: PDA of the AEP Settlement escrow whose milestone is being approved.

fields.name: milestone_index
docs: Index of the milestone to approve. `u8` per IC-4 — note Settlement's
public `approve_milestone(milestone_index: u32, ...)` is wider; the
Hook handler widens at the CPI boundary.

fields.name: base_tx_hash
docs: Hash of the Base-side x402 settle / CCTP burn transaction. Used as the
idempotency key together with `(escrow_pda, milestone_index)`.

fields.name: amount_returned_micros
docs: Amount of USDC (in 6-decimal "micros") returned to Solana via the
CCTP V2 round-trip. Recorded for dashboard observability and replay
audit; the actual on-chain release amount is what `Settlement`
already records on the milestone — this field does not authorize a
different number.

types.name: ReplayRecord
docs: Replay-guard PDA — initialized once per `(escrow, milestone_index,
base_tx_hash)` triple. The mere existence of this account is the
idempotency proof; the body is informational so the dashboard / off-chain
tooling can audit the historical round-trip without re-fetching the
CCTP message.
Open Q-S3-D: a separate close instruction (TTL-driven, rent reclaim) is
not yet scaffolded. Suggested default: 30 days, anyone may close, rent
goes to a treasury PDA — but explicit owner sign-off needed.

fields.name: escrow
docs: AEP Settlement escrow PDA from the IC-4 payload.

fields.name: milestone_index
docs: Milestone index from the IC-4 payload.

fields.name: base_tx_hash
docs: Base-side settle / burn transaction hash (idempotency key tail).

fields.name: amount_returned_micros
docs: Amount returned to Solana, in USDC micros.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp the record was opened (= milestone auto-approval time).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.
